title: Pastor Hall
writer: Ernst Toller, Leslie Arliss, Anna Reiner
actors: Wilfrid Lawson, Nova Pilbeam, Seymour Hicks
plot: This film is based on the story of Pastor Martin Neimuller, who was sent to Dachau concentration camp for criticizing the Nazi party. The small German village of Altdorf in the 1930s has to come to terms with Chancellor Hitler and...
